title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on IIFL Finance Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 11, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹3.10 lakh (Rupees Three Lakh Ten Thousand only) on IIFL Finance Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain provisions of the ‘Master Direction- Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Company - Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2023’ issued by RBI. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under section 58G(1)(b) read with section 58B(
